response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience with TypeScript/Node.js and recent exposure to MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq. However, the resume lacks demonstrated production GenAI delivery, RAG/vector database experience, cloud architecture depth on AWS/GCP/Azure, and customer-facing technical leadership typical of a Staff Forward Deployed Engineer role. The AI work appears recent and limited in scope relative to the 8+ years of production AI solutions required.
strengths: Strong polyglot engineering background with TypeScript, Node.js, and AWS CDK experience
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Proven track record of shipping production systems at scale (Dunnhumby, Optilyz) and public speaking/mentoring
concerns: No evidence of 8+ years building production GenAI solutions — AI work appears to be from 2025 onward only
Missing explicit experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, and LLM evaluation/observability pipelines
No demonstrated customer-facing forward-deployed or technical discovery leadership with enterprise stakeholders

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG/vector DB and cloud AI architecture evidence
